questions.question: Ek Multimeter ka primary use kya hai?

options.A: Current, Voltage, aur Resistance measure karna
options.B: Internet speed test karna

questions.explanation: Multimeter ek electronic tool hai jo electrical quantities jaise current, voltage, aur resistance ko measure karne ke kaam aata hai.

questions.question: ESD ka full form kya hai, aur hardware repair mein yeh kyun important hai?

options.A: Electrostatic Discharge, components ko damage se bachane ke liye
options.B: Electronic System Design, circuit design ke liye
options.C: External Storage Device, data backup ke liye
options.D: Emergency Shutdown Device, power off karne ke liye

questions.explanation: ESD ya Electrostatic Discharge, static electricity ke flow ko kehte hain. Hardware repair mein yeh bahut zaroori hai kyunki static charge sensitive electronic components ko permanently damage kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Ohm's Law ka formula kya hai?

options.B: P = V * I

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law states ki kisi conductor ke do points ke beech ka current, un do points ke beech ke voltage ke directly proportional hota hai, aur resistance ke inversely proportional hota hai. Formula hai V = I * R, jahan V voltage, I current, aur R resistance hai.

questions.question: Ek Resistor ka main function kya hai?

options.B: Electrical energy store karna
options.D: AC ko DC mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Resistor ka main kaam circuit mein current ke flow ko restrict ya control karna hota hai. Yeh electrical energy ko heat mein dissipate karta hai.

questions.question: Ek Capacitor kya store karta hai?

options.B: Magnetic field

questions.explanation: Capacitor ek passive electronic component hai jo electric field mein electrical charge store karta hai.

questions.question: Soldering iron ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Metal parts ko melt karna
options.C: Electronic components ko circuit board par join karna

questions.explanation: Soldering iron ka use electronic components ko circuit board par solder (join) karne ke liye kiya jaata hai, jisse electrical connection banta hai.

questions.question: Diode kis direction mein current flow allow karta hai?

options.B: Both directions

questions.explanation: Diode ek semiconductor device hai jo current ko sirf ek direction mein flow karne deta hai (forward bias), aur reverse direction mein block karta hai (reverse bias).

questions.question: Ek Transistor ka main function kya hai?

options.A: Signal ko amplify karna ya electronic switch ki tarah act karna
options.B: Voltage regulate karna

questions.explanation: Transistor ek semiconductor device hai jo electronic signals aur electrical power ko amplify ya switch karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar ek circuit mein 12V voltage hai aur 2A current flow ho raha hai, toh resistance kitni hogi?

options.B: 24 Ohms

questions.explanation: Ohm's Law ke according, R = V / I. Yahan V = 12V aur I = 2A. Toh R = 12 / 2 = 6 Ohms.

questions.question: Anti-static wrist strap pehenna kyun zaroori hai jab computer components handle kar rahe hon?

options.A: Components ko dust se bachane ke liye
options.B: User ko electrical shock se bachane ke liye
options.C: Static electricity ko discharge karke components ko damage se bachane ke liye
options.D: Components ko tight grip dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Anti-static wrist strap aapke body mein build-up hone wali static electricity ko ground karta hai, jisse sensitive electronic components ko ESD damage se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Power supply unit (PSU) mein konsa voltage output hota hai jo motherboard ko power karta hai?

options.B: High frequency voltage

questions.explanation: PSU (Power Supply Unit) wall socket se AC current leta hai aur usko DC current mein convert karta hai, jo computer components ko chahiye hota hai, jaise 3.3V, 5V, aur 12V DC.

questions.question: Ek continuity test ka kya purpose hota hai multimeter mein?

options.B: Circuit mein break ya short circuit detect karna

questions.explanation: Continuity test yeh check karta hai ki kya do points ke beech ek complete electrical path hai ya nahi. Agar path complete hai, toh multimeter beeps karta hai, indicating no break ya open circuit.

questions.question: SMD components ka full form kya hai?

options.B: System Main Driver

questions.explanation: SMD ka matlab Surface Mount Device hai. Yeh components circuit board ki surface par mount kiye jaate hain, through-hole components ke opposite jo holes se insert hote hain.

questions.question: Voltage ki unit kya hai?

options.B: Ohm

questions.explanation: Voltage ki unit Volt (V) hai, current ki Ampere (A), resistance ki Ohm (Ω), aur power ki Watt (W).

questions.question: Agar aapko laptop ke andar chhota screw tight karna hai, toh konsa tool use karenge?

options.B: Flat-head screwdriver

questions.explanation: Laptop jaise delicate electronics mein chhote screws hote hain, jinke liye precision screwdriver set (chhote Phillips ya Torx drivers) use karna chahiye.

questions.question: AC aur DC mein kya difference hai?

options.A: AC ki direction change hoti hai, DC ki constant rehti hai
options.B: AC sirf batteries se aata hai, DC wall outlets se
options.C: AC high voltage hota hai, DC low voltage
options.D: AC wires mein flow karta hai, DC air mein

questions.explanation: AC (Alternating Current) mein current ki direction periodically change hoti rehti hai, jabki DC (Direct Current) mein current sirf ek direction mein flow karta hai.

questions.question: Ek circuit board par short circuit kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Current ka ek unexpected low-resistance path se flow hona

questions.explanation: Short circuit tab hota hai jab current ek unexpected, low-resistance path se flow karta hai, jisse circuit mein zyada current flow hota hai aur components damage ho sakte hain ya aag lag sakti hai.

questions.question: CPU ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Computer Power Unit

questions.explanation: CPU ya Central Processing Unit, computer ka 'brain' hota hai jo saare calculations aur instructions execute karta hai.

questions.question: RAM ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Temporary data store karna jo CPU ko quickly access karna hota hai

questions.explanation: RAM (Random Access Memory) ek volatile memory hai jo current mein chal rahe programs aur data ko temporary store karti hai, jisse CPU unhe fast access kar sake. Power off hone par data erase ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Motherboard ka kya role hai computer mein?

options.B: Saare components ko connect karna aur communicate karana

questions.explanation: Motherboard computer ka main printed circuit board hai jo CPU, RAM, storage, aur other peripheral devices ko connect karta hai, aur unke beech communication enable karta hai.

questions.question: Agar computer 'no display' issue de raha hai, toh sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: RAM modules ko reseat karna ya check karna

questions.explanation: No display issue mein RAM modules ko reseat karna ya unki functionality check karna ek common troubleshooting step hai, kyunki loose ya faulty RAM display issues create kar sakti hai.

questions.question: PSU ka kya kaam hai computer mein?

options.B: AC current ko DC current mein convert karke components ko supply karna

questions.explanation: PSU (Power Supply Unit) wall socket se AC current lekar use DC current mein convert karta hai, jo computer ke internal components ko power karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Konsa port monitor connect karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Ethernet

questions.explanation: Monitors ko connect karne ke liye video output ports jaise HDMI, VGA, aur DisplayPort use hote hain.

questions.question: BIOS ka full form kya hai aur yeh kya karta hai?

options.A: Basic Input/Output System, computer boot hone par hardware initialize karta hai
options.B: Binary Integrated Operating System, Windows ka ek version
options.C: Built-in Operating Software, applications run karta hai
options.D: Basic Internet Operating System, internet access provide karta hai

questions.explanation: BIOS (Basic Input/Output System) ek firmware hai jo computer boot hone par hardware ko initialize karta hai aur operating system ko load karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Hard Disk Drive (HDD) aur Solid State Drive (SSD) mein kya main speed difference hai?

options.B: SSD HDD se significantly faster hai
options.D: Speed internet connection par depend karti hai

questions.explanation: SSDs mein moving parts nahi hote, isliye woh HDDs se significantly faster hote hain data read/write operations mein.

questions.question: Thermal paste ka kya kaam hai CPU aur heatsink ke beech?

options.B: CPU aur heatsink ke beech heat transfer ko improve karna
options.D: CPU ko electrical current supply karna

questions.explanation: Thermal paste CPU aur heatsink ke beech ke microscopic gaps ko fill karta hai, jisse heat transfer efficiency badhti hai aur CPU overheating se bachta hai.

questions.question: Ek computer ko assemble karte samay, sabse pehle konsa component case mein install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Motherboard

questions.explanation: Generally, PSU ko sabse pehle install kiya jaata hai kyunki yeh case ke bottom ya top par fix hota hai aur isse motherboard aur baaki components ke liye space ban jaati hai.

questions.question: CMOS battery ka kya role hai motherboard par?

options.B: BIOS settings aur system date/time ko maintain karna jab computer off ho

questions.explanation: CMOS (Complementary Metal-Oxide-Semiconductor) battery motherboard par BIOS settings (jaise boot order) aur system date/time ko maintain karti hai, even jab computer power off ho.

questions.question: PCIe slot kis type ke expansion cards ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Graphics cards, network cards, SSDs

questions.explanation: PCIe (Peripheral Component Interconnect Express) slots high-speed expansion cards jaise graphics cards, NVMe SSDs, aur network cards ko connect karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Agar computer boot hote samay beep codes de raha hai, toh yeh kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Hardware fault

questions.explanation: Beep codes BIOS/UEFI dwara generate kiye jaate hain aur yeh specific hardware faults ko indicate karte hain, jaise RAM failure, graphics card issue, ya CPU problem.

questions.question: Input device ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Printer

questions.explanation: Keyboard ek input device hai jisse user computer ko data aur commands provide karta hai. Monitor, Printer, aur Speaker output devices hain.

questions.question: USB port ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Unified System Board

questions.explanation: USB (Universal Serial Bus) ek common interface hai jo peripheral devices jaise keyboard, mouse, printers, aur external drives ko connect karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: POST ka full form kya hai aur yeh kab run hota hai?

options.A: Power-On Self-Test, jab computer start hota hai
options.B: Program Operating System Test, jab naya software install hota hai
options.C: Peripheral Output System Test, jab printer connect hota hai
options.D: Pre-Operating System Test, jab internet connect hota hai

questions.explanation: POST (Power-On Self-Test) ek diagnostic sequence hai jo computer ke start hone par BIOS/UEFI dwara run kiya jaata hai, hardware components ki functionality check karne ke liye.

questions.question: Ek computer ko disassembling karte samay, power cable disconnect karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Electrical shock aur components ko damage se bachane ke liye
options.C: Hardware ko thanda karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Electrical shock se bachne aur internal components ko damage se protect karne ke liye, computer ko disassemble karne se pehle power cable ko disconnect karna bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Laptop screen replacement ke liye, kis type ke panel ki zaroorat pad sakti hai?

options.B: LCD/LED

questions.explanation: Modern laptops mein LCD (Liquid Crystal Display) ya LED (Light Emitting Diode) panels use hote hain. Replacement ke liye sahi type aur resolution ka panel choose karna important hai.

questions.question: Agar laptop ka keyboard response nahi kar raha hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.A: Hard drive fail ho gaya hai
options.B: Keyboard flex cable loose ya damaged hai

questions.explanation: Laptop keyboards ek flex cable ke through motherboard se connect hote hain. Agar yeh cable loose ho ya damaged ho, toh keyboard kaam karna band kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Laptop batteries commonly kis type ki hoti hain?

options.B: Lead-acid

questions.explanation: Modern laptops mein Lithium-ion (Li-ion) batteries use hoti hain unki high energy density aur lightweight properties ke karan.

questions.question: Laptop mein 'DC Jack' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Internet connection provide karna
options.C: Laptop ko power adapter se charge karna

questions.explanation: DC Jack woh port hai jahan laptop ka power adapter connect hota hai, jisse laptop charge hota hai aur power receive karta hai.

questions.question: Laptop overheating prevent karne ke liye konsa component use hota hai?

options.B: Cooling fan aur heatsink

questions.explanation: Laptop mein cooling fan aur heatsink CPU aur GPU se heat dissipate karke overheating ko prevent karte hain.

questions.question: Agar laptop ka touchpad kaam nahi kar raha hai, toh kya troubleshooting steps le sakte hain?

options.A: Laptop restart karna, touchpad drivers update karna, ya flex cable check karna
options.B: Hard drive replace karna

questions.explanation: Touchpad issues ko troubleshoot karne ke liye laptop restart karna, drivers check/update karna, aur touchpad ke flex cable connection ko verify karna common steps hain.

questions.question: SODIMM modules kis device mein use hote hain?

options.B: Servers
options.C: Laptops aur small form factor PCs

questions.explanation: SODIMM (Small Outline Dual In-line Memory Module) RAM modules laptops aur small form factor PCs mein use hote hain kyunki yeh standard DIMM modules se chhote hote hain.

questions.question: M.2 SSDs ka kya advantage hai traditional 2.5 inch SSDs ke comparison mein?

options.B: Larger storage capacity
options.C: Smaller form factor aur faster speeds (NVMe ke through)

questions.explanation: M.2 SSDs bahut compact hote hain aur agar NVMe protocol use karte hain toh traditional SATA SSDs se significantly faster speeds provide karte hain.

questions.question: Laptop hinges ka kya role hai?

options.B: Screen ko body se connect karna aur uska angle adjust karna

questions.explanation: Laptop hinges screen ko main body se connect karte hain aur user ko screen ke viewing angle ko adjust karne ki facility dete hain. Damaged hinges screen ko support nahi kar paate.

questions.question: Agar laptop ki webcam kaam nahi kar rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: Webcam drivers, privacy settings, ya physical disconnection
options.B: Hard drive health

questions.explanation: Webcam issues ke liye drivers, operating system ki privacy settings (jahan webcam access restrict ho sakta hai), aur webcam ke internal connection ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Laptop ke Wi-Fi card ka kya function hai?

options.B: Wireless internet access provide karna

questions.explanation: Laptop ka Wi-Fi card wireless local area network (WLAN) se connect hone aur wireless internet access provide karne ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: BGA (Ball Grid Array) components ko repair karne ke liye kis type ke equipment ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Hot air rework station

questions.explanation: BGA components jaise CPU aur GPU, motherboard par solder kiye jaate hain aur unhe remove ya replace karne ke liye specialized hot air rework station ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Laptop ke 'flex cable' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Keyboard, touchpad, ya display jaise components ko motherboard se connect karna

questions.explanation: Flex cables (ribbon cables) thin aur flexible electrical cables hote hain jo laptop ke various components (jaise display, keyboard, touchpad) ko motherboard se connect karte hain.

questions.question: Agar laptop ki battery swollen (phooli hui) dikhe, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Jaldi se laptop se nikal kar safely dispose karna chahiye
options.C: Charger se connect karke charge karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Swollen battery ek serious safety hazard hai aur aag ya blast ka karan ban sakti hai. Ise turant laptop se nikal kar proper disposal facility mein dispose karna chahiye.

questions.question: Laptop ke speakers se sound nahi aa raha, toh kya troubleshoot karenge?

options.B: Audio drivers, volume settings, aur speaker connections check karenge

questions.explanation: Sound issues ke liye audio drivers ko update ya reinstall karna, system volume settings check karna, aur internal speaker connections ko verify karna common steps hain.

questions.question: Laptop mein BIOS password bhool jaane par, use kaise reset kar sakte hain (physical method)?

options.B: CMOS battery remove karke aur phir reconnect karke

questions.explanation: CMOS battery ko kuch der ke liye remove karne se motherboard ki volatile memory reset ho jaati hai, jismein BIOS settings aur password store hota hai. Yeh ek common physical method hai BIOS password reset karne ka.

questions.question: Laptop ke cooling system mein dust build-up ka kya effect hota hai?

options.B: Overheating aur performance slow hoti hai

questions.explanation: Dust build-up cooling fan aur heatsink ko block karta hai, jisse heat properly dissipate nahi ho paati aur laptop overheat hokar slow ho jaata hai ya shut down ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar ek desktop PC 'no power' de raha hai, toh sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Power cable connections aur wall socket

questions.explanation: No power issue mein sabse pehle power cable ka wall socket aur PSU se connection check karna chahiye. Kabhi-kabhi problem simple loose connection ya faulty power outlet hoti hai.

questions.question: Computer boot hote samay repetitive short beeps de raha hai, yeh kya indicate kar sakta hai?

options.B: RAM failure

questions.explanation: Most BIOS manufacturers ke according, repetitive short beeps RAM failure ko indicate karte hain. Yeh BIOS manufacturer par depend karta hai, lekin yeh ek common interpretation hai.

questions.question: Laptop screen par 'no display' hai lekin laptop chal raha hai (fan noise, light on), toh kya possibility ho sakti hai?

options.B: Screen cable loose/damaged ya screen itself faulty hai
options.C: Operating system crash ho gaya hai
options.D: Wi-Fi card fail ho gaya hai

questions.explanation: Agar laptop chal raha hai par display nahi aa raha, toh screen cable (LVDS cable) ka connection, ya screen panel ka failure ek common cause hota hai.

questions.question: Computer overheating ke kya symptoms ho sakte hain?

options.A: System bahut fast ho jaata hai
options.B: Fan bahut loud chalta hai, system slow hota hai, random shutdowns
options.D: Internet connection slow ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Overheating ke symptoms mein loud fan noise, system performance ka slow hona (throttling), aur sudden shutdowns shamil hain, kyunki components apne safe operating temperature se zyada garam ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Agar computer bahut slow chal raha hai, toh kya common reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Too many startup programs, full hard drive, insufficient RAM, malware
options.B: Monitor resolution bahut high hai

questions.explanation: Slow performance ke kayi reasons ho sakte hain, jaise bahut saare programs ka startup par run hona, hard drive ka full hona, RAM ki kami, ya malware/virus infections.

questions.question: Computer 'boot loop' mein atak gaya hai (bar-bar restart ho raha hai), toh kya troubleshoot karenge?

options.A: RAM modules check/reseat karna, startup repair karna, ya recent hardware changes ko review karna
options.B: Naya printer install karna

questions.explanation: Boot loop issues hardware (jaise RAM, HDD/SSD) ya software (corrupt OS, driver issues) ki wajah se ho sakte hain. RAM check, startup repair, aur recent changes ko undo karna common troubleshooting steps hain.

questions.question: Ek PSU ko test karne ke liye konsa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Multimeter (voltage check)

questions.explanation: PSU ke output voltages ko check karne ke liye multimeter ka use kiya jaata hai, yeh verify karne ke liye ki kya PSU correct voltages supply kar raha hai ya nahi.

questions.question: Agar hard drive se clicking sound aa rahi hai, toh yeh kya indicate karta hai?

options.A: Hard drive theek se kaam kar raha hai
options.B: Hard drive fail hone wala hai ya ho chuka hai
options.C: Hard drive bahut fast chal raha hai
options.D: Hard drive ko defragmentation ki zaroorat hai

questions.explanation: Clicking sound usually hard drive ke internal mechanical parts (read/write heads) ke failure ko indicate karta hai. Yeh data loss ka ek strong warning sign hai.

questions.question: Blue Screen of Death (BSOD) kya hai aur yeh kyun aata hai?

options.B: Ek critical system error jo hardware ya driver issues ki wajah se hota hai

questions.explanation: BSOD ek critical Windows error hai jo tab aata hai jab operating system ko ek serious problem face hoti hai, usually hardware failure, corrupt drivers, ya OS kernel issues ke karan.

questions.question: RAM ko test karne ke liye konsa utility use hota hai?

options.B: MemTest86+

questions.explanation: MemTest86+ ek popular aur effective tool hai jo RAM modules mein errors detect karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar ek laptop randomly shut down ho jaata hai, toh kya possible reasons ho sakte hain?

options.B: Overheating, faulty battery, ya power supply issues

questions.explanation: Random shutdowns overheating, faulty laptop battery, ya power adapter/DC jack issues ki wajah se ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Graphics card ke issues ke kya symptoms ho sakte hain?

options.A: No display, distorted images, artifacts, system freezes during graphics-intensive tasks
options.B: Slow internet speed

questions.explanation: Graphics card issues ke symptoms mein display na aana, screen par ajeeb patterns (artifacts), distorted images, aur graphics-intensive applications chalate waqt system ka freeze hona ya crash hona shamil hai.

questions.question: Loose connection ka kya matlab hai hardware troubleshooting mein?

options.B: Component ka cable ya connector properly seated nahi hai

questions.explanation: Loose connection ka matlab hai ki koi cable ya component (jaise RAM module) apne slot mein theek se laga hua nahi hai, jisse intermittent ya complete functionality loss ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Intermittent power failure (kabhi power on, kabhi nahi) ka kya cause ho sakta hai?

options.A: Faulty power button, loose power connections, ya dying PSU
options.B: Corrupt operating system

questions.explanation: Intermittent power issues faulty power button, loose internal power connections, ya ek failing Power Supply Unit (PSU) ki wajah se ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek laptop mein liquid spill ho gaya hai, toh sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Laptop ko turant off karke battery remove kar deni chahiye
options.B: Laptop ko charge par laga dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Liquid spill hone par turant laptop ko off karke battery remove kar deni chahiye, jisse short circuit aur extensive damage ko prevent kiya ja sake. Hair dryer use karna avoid karein kyunki yeh liquid ko aur andar dhakel sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek external device (jaise USB drive) connect karne par computer hang ho jaata hai, toh kya troubleshoot karenge?

options.B: USB port check karenge, device drivers check karenge, ya device ko kisi aur computer par test karenge

questions.explanation: Yeh issue USB port ke damage hone, device ke drivers ke corrupt hone, ya external device ke khud faulty hone ki wajah se ho sakta hai. In cheezon ko check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek computer repair technician ke liye 'systematic troubleshooting approach' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Problem ko identify karna, possible causes hypothesize karna, test karna, aur solution implement karna

questions.explanation: Systematic troubleshooting approach mein problem ko clearly define karna, possible causes ko narrow down karna, un causes ko test karna, aur phir solution ko verify karna shamil hai. Yeh efficient aur effective repair ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: HDD (Hard Disk Drive) aur SSD (Solid State Drive) mein se konsa shock aur vibration ke prati zyada durable hai?

options.B: SSD

questions.explanation: SSD mein koi moving parts nahi hote, isliye woh HDDs se zyada durable hote hain aur shock, vibration, aur drops ke prati zyada resistant hote hain.

questions.question: Hard drive partitioning ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Hard drive ko physically cut karna
options.B: Hard drive ko multiple logical sections mein divide karna

questions.explanation: Partitioning se ek single physical hard drive ko multiple independent logical drives mein divide kiya ja sakta hai, jisse operating system aur data ko separate rakhna easy ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Data backup kyun important hai?

options.A: Computer ki speed badhane ke liye
options.B: Data loss se bachne ke liye (hardware failure, accidental deletion, malware)
options.C: Internet access improve karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Data backup critical data ko protect karne ke liye zaroori hai, agar original data corrupt ho jaaye, delete ho jaaye, ya hardware fail ho jaaye.

questions.question: Agar ek hard drive 'bad sectors' show kar raha hai, toh iska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Hard drive mein additional storage space hai
options.B: Hard drive ka ek portion corrupt ya damaged hai aur data store nahi kar sakta
options.C: Hard drive bahut fast chal raha hai
options.D: Hard drive ko naye drivers ki zaroorat hai

questions.explanation: Bad sectors hard drive par storage clusters hote hain jo read/write errors dete hain aur data ko store ya retrieve nahi kar sakte. Yeh hard drive failure ka sign ho sakta hai.

questions.question: SATA connector ka kya use hai computer mein?

options.B: Hard drives aur optical drives ko motherboard se connect karna

questions.explanation: SATA (Serial Advanced Technology Attachment) ek interface hai jo hard drives, SSDs, aur optical drives ko motherboard se data transfer ke liye connect karta hai.

questions.question: NVMe SSDs ka kya advantage hai SATA SSDs ke comparison mein?

options.B: Significantly higher read/write speeds

questions.explanation: NVMe (Non-Volatile Memory Express) SSDs PCIe interface ka use karte hain, jisse woh traditional SATA SSDs se kai guna faster data transfer speeds achieve karte hain.

questions.question: Data recovery software ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Deleted, lost, ya corrupt data ko retrieve karna

questions.explanation: Data recovery software use kiya jaata hai accidentally deleted files, formatted drives, ya corrupt storage devices se data ko retrieve karne ke liye.

questions.question: Hard drive cloning ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek hard drive ki exact copy dusre hard drive par banana
options.C: Hard drive ka naam change karna

questions.explanation: Hard drive cloning mein ek source drive ke saare data (OS, applications, files) ki exact copy ek target drive par banayi jaati hai.

questions.question: RAID ka full form kya hai aur iska kya benefit hai?

options.A: Random Access Integrated Drive, speed badhata hai
options.B: Redundant Array of Independent Disks, data redundancy aur performance improve karta hai
options.C: Rapid Access Internal Disk, storage badhata hai
options.D: Remote Area Internet Drive, network access provide karta hai

questions.explanation: RAID (Redundant Array of Independent Disks) multiple hard drives ko ek single logical unit mein combine karta hai, jisse data redundancy (fault tolerance) aur/ya performance improve hoti hai.

questions.question: File system jaise NTFS aur FAT32 ka kya role hai?

options.B: Data ko storage device par kaise store aur retrieve kiya jaata hai, yeh manage karna
options.D: Hardware components ko power supply karna

questions.explanation: File system data ko storage devices par organize aur manage karta hai, jaise files aur directories ko kaise store, locate, aur access kiya jaayega.

questions.question: Agar ek USB drive detect nahi ho rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.A: USB port, drive health, ya drivers
options.B: Monitor cable

questions.explanation: USB drive detect na hone par, alag USB port try karna, device manager mein drivers check karna, aur drive ko kisi aur computer par test karna common troubleshooting steps hain.

questions.question: Data wiping ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Data ko permanently erase karna jisse woh recover na ho sake

questions.explanation: Data wiping ek process hai jismein storage device se data ko permanently erase kiya jaata hai, often multiple overwrite passes ke through, jisse woh recover na ho sake.

questions.question: SSD firmware update kyun important hai?

options.A: SSD ka physical size badhane ke liye
options.B: Performance, stability, aur compatibility improve karne ke liye
options.C: SSD ko HDD mein convert karne ke liye
options.D: SSD ko format karne ke liye

questions.explanation: SSD firmware updates bug fixes, performance improvements, aur compatibility enhancements provide karte hain, jisse drive ki overall reliability aur longevity badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek external hard drive power receive kar raha hai lekin detect nahi ho raha, toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.A: Cable damaged, drivers missing, ya drive partition corrupt
options.B: Laptop screen resolution mismatch

questions.explanation: Power milne ke baad bhi detect na hone par, data cable (USB cable) ki health, device drivers ki presence, aur drive ke partition table ki integrity check karna chahiye.

questions.question: Data corruption kya hai?

options.B: Data ka unreadable ya unusable ho jaana errors ki wajah se

questions.explanation: Data corruption tab hota hai jab data storage, transmission, ya processing ke dauran errors ki wajah se unreadable ya unusable ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Power failure ke baad data loss se bachne ke liye kya use karna chahiye?

options.B: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS)

questions.explanation: UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) power failure ke dauran computer ko temporary power provide karta hai, jisse user safely data save karke system ko shut down kar sake, data loss se bachne ke liye.

questions.question: Laptop ka power adapter ka main kaam kya hai?

options.B: AC wall current ko DC current mein convert karke laptop ko power aur charge karna

questions.explanation: Laptop power adapter (charger) AC wall current ko laptop ke liye required DC voltage mein convert karta hai, jisse laptop run ho sake aur uski battery charge ho sake.

questions.question: UPS (Uninterruptible Power Supply) ka kya function hai?

options.B: Power outages ke dauran computer ko backup power supply karna

questions.explanation: UPS power outages ya fluctuations ke dauran computer aur connected devices ko temporary battery backup power supply karta hai, jisse data loss se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Laptop battery ki lifespan ko kaise badhaya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Deep discharge aur overcharge avoid karke, aur normal operating temperature maintain karke
options.D: Battery ko freezer mein rakh kar

questions.explanation: Battery ki lifespan badhane ke liye use deep discharge ya overcharge na karein, aur use extreme temperatures se bachayein. 20-80% charge level maintain karna bhi beneficial hota hai.

questions.question: Agar laptop ka charger garam ho raha hai, toh yeh kya indicate kar sakta hai?

options.B: Charger overstressed hai ya faulty hai, ya laptop mein power issue hai
options.C: Charger bahut fast charge kar raha hai
options.D: Charger ko dust ki zaroorat hai

questions.explanation: Thoda garam hona normal hai, lekin agar charger bahut zyada garam ho raha hai, toh yeh overstress (zyada load), internal fault, ya laptop mein power related component failure ko indicate kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Power strip with surge protection ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Connected devices ko voltage spikes se protect karna

questions.explanation: Surge protector connected devices ko sudden voltage spikes ya 'surges' se hone wale damage se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Laptop battery calibration ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Battery ki physical size adjust karna
options.B: Operating system ko battery ke actual charge level ki accurate reading dena

questions.explanation: Battery calibration operating system aur battery ke charge controller ke beech ki communication ko synchronize karta hai, jisse battery percentage ki accurate reading milti hai.

questions.question: SMPS ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Standard Main Power System

questions.explanation: SMPS (Switched-Mode Power Supply) ek electronic power supply hai jo switching regulator ka use karke electrical power ko efficiently transfer karta hai. Modern computer PSUs SMPS technology par based hote hain.

questions.question: Agar laptop ka DC jack damaged hai (loose, broken), toh kya symptom hoga?

options.B: Laptop charge nahi hoga ya intermittent charge hoga

questions.explanation: Damaged DC jack power adapter se laptop tak power transfer ko affect karta hai, jisse laptop charge nahi hota ya intermittent charging issues aate hain.

questions.question: Power cable ke loose connections se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Intermittent power, system instability, ya components ka damage

questions.explanation: Loose power connections se intermittent power supply ho sakti hai, jisse system unstable ho sakta hai, ya components ko damage bhi ho sakta hai due to fluctuating power.

questions.question: Laptop adapter ke specifications mein 'Output: 19V 3.42A' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Adapter 19 Volts aur 3.42 Amperes ka AC current supply karta hai
options.B: Adapter 19 Volts aur 3.42 Amperes ka DC current supply karta hai
options.C: Adapter 19 Watts aur 3.42 Amperes ka power supply karta hai

questions.explanation: Laptop adapters AC current ko DC current mein convert karte hain. Output specifications batate hain ki adapter kitna DC Voltage (19V) aur kitna maximum current (3.42A) provide kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Aap ek faulty laptop power adapter ko kaise diagnose karenge?

options.B: Multimeter se output voltage check karke

questions.explanation: Multimeter se adapter ke output pin par voltage check karke verify kiya ja sakta hai ki kya adapter sahi voltage supply kar raha hai ya nahi.

questions.question: Power rail ka kya matlab hai motherboard par?

options.A: Motherboard ko physically support karne wala rail
options.B: Motherboard par specific voltage levels provide karne wale electrical paths
options.D: RAM modules ko hold karne wala slot

questions.explanation: Power rails motherboard par specific electrical paths hote hain jo various components (CPU, RAM, GPU) ko required DC voltage levels supply karte hain. Faulty power rails se component failure ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar laptop ki battery health bahut kam ho gayi hai, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Battery ko replace karna chahiye
options.C: Laptop ko hamesha charge par rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar battery health significantly degrade ho gayi hai, toh uski performance aur run-time kam ho jaayega. Aisi battery ko replace karna hi best solution hai.

questions.question: Overcurrent protection ka kya role hai power supply mein?

options.A: Power supply ko zyada voltage se bachana
options.B: Power supply ko excessive current flow se bachana
options.C: Power supply ko overheating se bachana

questions.explanation: Overcurrent protection (OCP) ek safety feature hai jo power supply ko aur connected components ko damage se bachata hai, agar current ek safe limit se zyada flow ho jaaye.

questions.question: Grounding ka kya matlab hai electrical systems mein?

options.A: Current ko air mein release karna
options.B: Excess electrical charge ko earth tak divert karna safety ke liye

questions.explanation: Grounding ek safety measure hai jismein excess electrical charge ko earth tak divert kiya jaata hai, jisse electrical shock aur equipment damage ko prevent kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Agar ek laptop charger connect karne par bhi 'not charging' show kar raha hai, toh kya possible reasons ho sakte hain?

options.A: Faulty charger, damaged DC jack, ya battery controller issue
options.B: Loose RAM modules

questions.explanation: Not charging issue ke liye faulty charger, damaged DC jack (port), ya laptop ke internal battery charging circuit/controller mein problem ho sakti hai. Battery health bhi ek factor ho sakta hai.
